<<The Great Jipner Joke>>

* * *

The villain moment starts with Zombo, a clown ghost who's mean, ugly, and a clown ghost. He warns the gang to stay away from Jipner's Joyland, and flies away with Shaggy. Scooby puts on a cowboy outfit, and uses his tail as a lasso to save Shaggy.

* * *

Fred mistakes Jolly Jipner for a famous person because of his surname, and Jolly gets angry. Zombo blames Red Herring for the crime, and Red gets mad at Fred. The gang questions why the park is closed and why Zombo is a clown ghost.

* * *

Velma tries to sound smart but is overly simple, saying "This door opens stuff." The gang knows the park doesn't sound like it exists and questions why Zombo is haunting it. They also question the motives of the Jipners and why they would want to close the park.

* * *

The gang finds blueprints and a clown make-up kit, which Velma uses to solve the mystery. Zombo is revealed to be Joey Jipner, who wanted to take over the park. The gang questions why Joey would fake his own death and why he needed to scare away customers.

* * *

Fred mistakes Joey for a famous person, and Joey gets angry. The gang questions why Zombo would be a clown ghost and why he would want to steal money. They also question the physics of how Zombo can fly and why he would use a tire swing to attack them.

* * *

The gang finds Scooby missing on the tire swing ride, and Shaggy says it's enough for a pup named Scooby-Doo. The gang questions why the park has a tire swing and why Zombo would use it to attack them. They also question the logic of the plot and why Zombo would be a clown ghost.

* * *
